raw_consumer_statement:
XX/XX/XXXX I last used my Citibank credit card paying for XXXX XXXX in XXXX XXXX parking {$5.00}. 
XXXX my card was used again at XXXX mall and the all around XXXX city and XXXX etc to purchase XXXX XXXX food at a restaurant at XXXX. I caught in on XX/XX/XXXX I try to log in every day or other day. And I filed a fraud dispute. Citibank said if I had my card its impossible for someone else to have made the transaction. I thought I had the card but I have to now look in my house. But I asked them to try to ask to see camera footage as each transaction has a time stamp. They refused to ask the merchants. Total 9 transactions amounted to {$750.00}. 
I reopened a dispute with Citibank and they dont seem to care. I was at a soccer game that day. Also all of my XXXX  transactions go in my member card. I have no XXXX transactions on my card for XX/XX/XXXX or XX/XX/XXXX. 
The person who used my card would have had to use a member card to make their purchase in XXXX XXXX. I feel Citibank did not fully investigate the fraud case.
